execution_guard.exact_approval_text_required: I approve writes to D:/Nautilus/nautilus_ctp_adapter to run owner-owned guarded OpenCTP paper submit/cancel scripts for P024 partial-fill acceptance; expected impact: create owner-owned runtime/debug/readback/reconciliation artifacts outside this worktree and may submit/cancel up to one small exposure-reduction paper order in the 19053 simulation account.

runtime_input_requirements.reason: proves the account still has reducible rb2610 exposure before submit
quantity must be greater than one for a real partial fill to be possible and must not exceed current reducible position
price must be selected from current owner market/readback context, not a screenshot
cancel must use owner readback order_ref/front_id/session_id/exchange_id

operator_sequence.action: confirm exact partial-fill approval text is present
capture fresh owner pre snapshot and verify reducible rb2610 position quantity is at least the intended order quantity
run guarded submit template once with quantity 2 or 3 and owner-reviewed limit price
classify owner callbacks/readback as partial, full fill, no fill, reject or timeout
run guarded cancel template with owner readback identity when the order is cancellable
capture post-cancel owner readback and reconciliation artifacts
ingest refs/checksums if partial-fill then cancel succeeded; otherwise record typed blocker with observed owner artifacts

non_ui_runtime: same native order identity across submit, trade/readback and cancel
redaction report confirms raw secrets and endpoints were not recorded
web_ui_runtime: Web UI order identity matches owner native identity refs
fill rows match owner trade callback/readback refs
cancel pending is not rendered as final
terminal cancelled state cites owner readback and reconciliation refs
